milestone_brief: Implement UPL-1 from .claude/notes/frontend-uplifts/2026q2-panel-refresh/artifacts/final-report.md (rank 5, adj-RICE 10.4, foundational): extract scattered hex literals in styles.py and appearance_panel.py into a PALETTE_LIGHT dict with at least 6 named tokens (BG_VIEWPORT, BG_PANEL, TEXT_VALUE, TEXT_MUTED, FOCUS_RING, plus variety-family color placeholders). Preserve every existing rendered color and dock-size. Foundational refactor for the rest of the first-wave bundle. Also resolves the AI-13-adjacency #888 short-hex finding cataloged as UPL-21.
research_synthesis: Both researchers converged: add module-level PALETTE_LIGHT dict to styles.py (NOT new file), 18 distinct tokens, keep existing named constants as thin aliases for zero call-site changes outside styles.py. Migrate 20 hex literals (15 in styles.py, 3 in appearance_panel.py, 2 in app.py); fix the AI-13-adjacency #888 -> #888888 (UPL-21). Token names follow Qt QPalette/napari/ParaView convention (BG_*, TEXT_*, BORDER_*, FOCUS_RING). Add empty VARIETY_DEFAULT_COLOR stub for UPL-5.
